$description: Material 3 parity REFERENCE SET for the #2024 conformance harness — WE-owned data, not harness code. The canonical component set (button/input/card) and the Material 3 md.sys.* roles each is themed by, each naming the resolved DTCG path the flavor (we:design-systems/material.tokens.json) authors that role onto. The harness (fui:plugs/webtheme/conformanceHarness.ts scoreFlavor) diffs each role against what the tokens+intents model can land on a rendered component and emits a per-component compliance score + gap list. Authored by #2023 as the FULL M3 flavor superseding the material-like seed's 2-role reference. Scoring THIS through the SAME scoreFlavor as shadcn/ant/carbon/fluent — with zero M3-specific code — is the #2024 target-agnostic proof (acceptance 2). The two M3 signatures — state layers and tonal elevation — surface as gaps (no token home), the expected M3-vs-tokens residual.
